  • Constructor Details

    • ValueInjector

      public ValueInjector()

  • Method Details

    • injection

      public static <T> T injection(ProofScriptCommand command, @NonNull T obj, ScriptCommandAst arguments) throws ArgumentRequiredException, InjectionReflectionException, NoSpecifiedConverterException, ConversionException
      Injects the given arguments in the obj. For more details see inject(Object, ScriptCommandAst)
      Type Parameters:
      T - an arbitrary type
      Parameters:
      command - a proof script command
      obj - a parameter class with annotation
      arguments - a non-null map of string pairs
      Returns:
      the same object as obj
      Throws:
      ArgumentRequiredException - a required argument was not given in arguments
      InjectionReflectionException - an access on some reflection methods occurred
      NoSpecifiedConverterException - unknown type for the current converter map
      ConversionException - an converter could not translate the given value in arguments

    • getInstance

      public static ValueInjector getInstance()
      Returns the default instance of a ValueInjector Use with care. No multi-threading.
      Returns:
      a static reference to the default converter.
      See Also:
      • createDefault()

    • createDefault

      public static ValueInjector createDefault()
      Returns a fresh instance of a ValueInjector with the support for basic primitive data types.
      Returns:
      a fresh instance

    • inject

      public <T> T inject(T obj, ScriptCommandAst arguments) throws ConversionException, InjectionReflectionException, NoSpecifiedConverterException, ArgumentRequiredException
      Injects the converted version of the given arguments in the given obj.
      Type Parameters:
      T - type safety
      Parameters:
      obj - a non-null instance of a parameter class (with annotation)
      arguments - a non-null string map
      Returns:
      the same object as obj
      Throws:
      ArgumentRequiredException - a required argument was not given in arguments
      InjectionReflectionException - an access on some reflection methods occurred
      NoSpecifiedConverterException - unknown type for the current converter map
      ConversionException - an converter could not translate the given value in arguments
      See Also:
      • Option
      • Flag

    • convert

      public <T> T convert(Class<T> targetType, Object val) throws NoSpecifiedConverterException, ConversionException
      Throws:
      NoSpecifiedConverterException
      ConversionException

    • convert

      public <T> T convert(Object val, Class<T> type) throws NoSpecifiedConverterException, ConversionException
      Throws:
      NoSpecifiedConverterException
      ConversionException

    • addConverter

      public <R,T> void addConverter(Class<R> ret, Class<T> arg, Converter<R,T> conv)
      Registers the given converter for the specified class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - an arbitrary type
      Parameters:
      ret - a class
      conv - a converter for the given class

    • addConverter

      public <R,T> void addConverter(Converter<R,T> conv)

    • getConverter

      public <R,T> @Nullable Converter<R,T> getConverter(Class<R> ret, Class<T> arg)
      Finds a converter for the given class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - an arbitrary type
      Parameters:
      ret - a non-null class
      arg -
      Returns:
      null or a suitable converter (registered) converter for the requested class.
